name: Pomodoro Island
description: Pomodoro timer with control panel and interactive external QxIsland.
author: mcx

preferences.label: Focus minutes
preferences.description: Length of a focus session in minutes.

preferences.label: Short break minutes
preferences.description: Length of a short break in minutes.

commands.name: start-focus
commands.title: Pomodoro: Start Focus
commands.description: Start a focus timer in the external QxIsland.

commands.name: start-short-break
commands.title: Pomodoro: Start Short Break
commands.description: Start a short break in the external QxIsland.

commands.name: toggle-pomodoro
commands.title: Pomodoro: Pause or Resume
commands.description: Pause or resume the active Pomodoro timer.

commands.name: stop-pomodoro
commands.title: Pomodoro: Stop
commands.description: Stop the timer and dismiss its island display.
